name: Charter Hall Long Wale Reit
analysis: CLW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.6800. Trade idea: entry A$3.7000, stop A$3.2967, target A$4.9099 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
